name: Soup Satisfier
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced celery (3 stalks of celery)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine broth, chicken, vegetables, and spices in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Stir the egg noodles into the boiling broth.
4. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the noodles are tender, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
